touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Brandon Suzuki at NimbusSignal. No answer, left voicemail introducing AskElephant's sales-to-CS handoff automation for fintech teams.
Second cold call attempt to Brandon Suzuki. No answer, no voicemail left this time.
LinkedIn connection request sent to Brandon Suzuki with brief note about helping fintech sales teams automate handoffs. No response.
Third cold call attempt to Brandon Suzuki. Reached voicemail, left message referencing LinkedIn outreach and fintech use case.
Cold email sent to Brandon highlighting how NimbusSignal's sales team could reduce handoff errors with AskElephant's automation. No response.
Fourth cold call attempt to Brandon Suzuki. No answer, left brief voicemail referencing previous email.
Follow-up cold email to Brandon with case study of similar fintech company reducing sales-to-CS handoff time by 67%. Brandon responded expressing interest in learning more.

questions_asked.question: What does your typical implementation timeline look like?
questions_asked.answer: Most mid-market teams are up and running in 2-3 weeks with our unlimited automation tier.

next_steps: Schedule initial call to discuss NimbusSignal's current handoff process

touches.ai_summary: Confirmation email sent with meeting link and prep questions for discovery call. No response needed.
Reminder call attempt day before scheduled discovery. Brandon didn't pick up, meeting already confirmed via email.
Follow-up call attempt after missed discovery meeting. Left voicemail offering to reschedule.
Email to Brandon apologizing for the scheduling mix-up and proposing three new times for discovery call. Brandon replied confirming availability.
next_steps: Discovery call rescheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message thanking Brandon for rescheduling and sharing a brief video walkthrough of the platform. No response.
Pre-call email with discovery agenda and request for Brandon to invite relevant stakeholders. Brandon confirmed and mentioned he'd loop in RevOps team members.

questions_asked.question: Who else should join from your team?
questions_asked.answer: I'll bring Nicole and Zainab from RevOps—they own the handoff process today.

next_steps: Send calendar invite to Nicole Bennett and Zainab Brooks

touches.ai_summary: Introduction email sent to Nicole and Zainab with discovery call details. No response needed.

Discovery call with Brandon (Head of Sales). Discussed NimbusSignal's current manual handoff process causing 15-20% data loss between sales and CS. Brandon described pain points around deal context not reaching account managers, leading to customer confusion post-sale. Interested in automation to reduce handoff time and improve data accuracy.

questions_asked.question: How does AskElephant capture context from unstructured sales calls?
questions_asked.answer: We use AI to extract key deal details, pain points, and commitments from call transcripts and emails, then structure them for your CS team.

questions_asked.question: What's your current handoff process today?
questions_asked.answer: Reps manually fill out a handoff form in Salesforce, but it's often incomplete or delayed. Account managers have to dig through call notes themselves.

questions_asked.question: Can this integrate with our existing Salesforce and Gong setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with both. The data flows automatically without manual work from your team.

next_steps: Send custom demo environment for NimbusSignal team to explore
Schedule follow-up with Hannah Osei (COO) to discuss strategic alignment

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Brandon with discovery recap, demo environment credentials, and proposed times for exec meeting with Hannah. Brandon confirmed Hannah's availability and requested pricing context before the meeting.

questions_asked.question: Can you share ballpark pricing so Hannah has context going in?
questions_asked.answer: For 27 seats with unlimited automation, you'd be looking at roughly $20-25K annually. We can dial in specifics based on Hannah's priorities.

next_steps: Prepare exec meeting deck focused on ROI and strategic value for Hannah

touches.ai_summary: Email check-in with Brandon asking for feedback on demo environment. Brandon replied that the team tested it and Rachel Kumar (Account Manager) was impressed with the automated handoff summaries.
next_steps: Incorporate Rachel's feedback into exec meeting discussion

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Hannah Osei (COO) and Brandon Suzuki. Hannah focused on strategic alignment with NimbusSignal's Q2 goal to improve customer onboarding NPS. Discussed how reducing sales-to-CS friction directly impacts onboarding experience. Hannah expressed strong support and asked about implementation lift on her team.

questions_asked.question: What's the implementation burden on our CS and RevOps teams?
questions_asked.answer: Minimal. Our team handles the technical setup and integration. Your team just needs 2-3 hours for workflow configuration and training.

questions_asked.question: What metrics matter most to you for measuring success here?
questions_asked.answer: Time to first value for new customers and reduction in support tickets during onboarding. If we can cut handoff errors, both should improve.

questions_asked.question: How quickly can we get this live?
questions_asked.answer: We can have you fully operational within 3 weeks from contract signature.

next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing and implementation timeline
Loop in Rachel Kumar for handoff workflow design session

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Brandon following proposal review. Brandon mentioned budget approval process requires CFO sign-off for deals over $20K. Discussed flexibility on contract term and seat count to find a fit.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on annual vs. multi-year pricing?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer a 15% discount for a 2-year commitment, which would bring your annual cost down to around $20K per year.

questions_asked.question: What's the approval timeline on your end?
questions_asked.answer: If we can finalize terms this week, I can get CFO approval by end of next week and target signature by month-end.

objections: Budget threshold of $20K requires CFO approval, which adds a week to the process
next_steps: Revise proposal with 2-year term and discounted pricing
Schedule pricing call to finalize terms

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call with Brandon to finalize contract terms. Agreed on $23,800 ACV for 27 seats with unlimited automation tier. Brandon confirmed this fits within approved budget and meets CFO threshold requirements.

questions_asked.question: Can we include a pilot period or trial clause in case adoption is slower than expected?
questions_asked.answer: We typically don't offer formal trial clauses in annual contracts, but we do include a 30-day onboarding success guarantee where we'll work with you to hit adoption targets.

questions_asked.question: Does this pricing work within your approved budget?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, $23,800 is within our allocated spend for sales enablement tools this quarter. I'll route this to legal and finance for final review.

next_steps: Send final contract for legal review
Introduce implementation team to Nicole and Zainab

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation call with Brandon to address legal redlines. NimbusSignal's legal team requested standard data privacy and SLA terms. Both parties agreed to minor contract language adjustments. Brandon confirmed signature expected within 48 hours.

questions_asked.question: Can we add a clause specifying data residency requirements for financial data?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. We can commit to US-only data residency in the contract, which is standard for fintech customers.

next_steps: Incorporate legal redlines into final contract
Schedule kickoff call with implementation team for post-signature
